rubric.pass: EI + Glyph acknowledges the semantic conflict, has ASK before GEN, and avoids sarcasm markers in the final customer apology while the direct fixture fails at least one of those checks.
rubric.warn: Both sides pass text checks but only EI + Glyph has trace evidence.
rubric.fail: EI + Glyph does not beat the direct fixture.

scoring.threshold_pass: EI + Glyph passed and direct fixture failed
scoring.threshold_warn: not used in the first comparison proof
